expected_behavior: Scans only for broken wikilinks - extracts all [[link]] patterns from .md files, checks if each target exists as a page, and reports any that don't resolve to existing pages

task_input: Run wiki_self_heal.py on a wiki containing external project repos (e.g., finance-tracker/) nested inside the wiki tree
expected_behavior: Script picks up non-wiki files like finance-tracker/AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md and flags them as orphans or missing frontmatter, even though they are project-specific documentation, not wiki content
Shows what pages would be generated for high-priority gaps (score >= threshold) without making changes; requires LM Studio API connectivity and correct model ID format

task_input: Run wiki health check via cron job weekly
expected_behavior: Crontab entry '0 9 * * 1 cd ~/wiki && python3 scripts/wiki_self_heal.py --all >> ~/logs/wiki-health.log' runs every Monday at 9am, logs output for review without interactive output

task_input: Verify that .obsidian/ and raw/ directories are properly excluded from scanning
expected_behavior: get_all_markdown_files() skips any file where any path part matches skip_dirs containing '.obsidian' and 'raw', preventing macOS app data and user transcripts from being treated as wiki pages
